title: Watch: Elderly woman rescued by robot from Ukraine's frontline
summary_full: The Ukrainian army spotted the woman using a drone and sent the machine to her rescue as she was trying to leave her war-torn village.
summary_public: The Ukrainian army spotted the woman using a drone and sent the machine to her rescue as she was trying to leave her war-torn village.
